name: @visuelconcept/wui-camera-streams
description: Camera Streams (RTSP) page — view RTSP IP cameras in the browser (JSMpeg) over a same-origin ws↔ws relay to a dedicated rtspProxy manager (ffmpeg, one pull fanned out to N clients). Self-contained source (kit vendored under _kit/): frontend + /api/rtsp backend module (HTTP + WebSocket relay) + the rtspProxy manager.
